method.name: connected_sheets_version_breakpoint_detection
method.decision_policy: Use column-count groups as seeds, then attach block, formula-signature, and grouping-layout drift before repeated-family semantic evidence is used.

follow_up_actions.action: Review breakpoints supported only by weak layout drift before using them for semantic promotion evidence.
follow_up_actions.done_when: Each review-required breakpoint is accepted, merged with a neighboring version group, or rejected.

parser_observations.message: Version detection is structural evidence only and does not promote semantic concepts.
2 version groups still contain intra-group drift.
